floater.name: floater_fs_ads_options
floater.title: AIM DOWN SIGHTS
floater.text: Aim down sights (double-tap and hold right-click)

slider.label: ADS field of view:
slider.tool_tip: Aim-down-sights zoom level in radians (lower = more zoom). Scroll while in ADS to adjust live.

slider.label: ADS zoom smoothing (ms):
slider.tool_tip: Duration of the ADS zoom transition, in milliseconds (0 = instant).

slider.label: Double-tap window (sec):
slider.tool_tip: Maximum time between the two right-clicks to register a double-tap.

slider.label: ADS swap speed (ms):
slider.tool_tip: How fast the camera swaps between OTS and first person when aiming down sights (0 = instant, higher = smoother).

slider.label: ADS zoom sensitivity:
slider.tool_tip: Scroll-wheel step for adjusting the ADS zoom level while held.

slider.label: ADS mouse sensitivity:
slider.tool_tip: Mouse look sensitivity while aiming down sights. Lower values make precision aiming easier. Independent of the normal and zoomed mouselook sensitivity.

check_box.label: ADS vignette in first person
check_box.tool_tip: Darken the screen edges while in ADS in first person.

check_box.label: ADS vignette in OTS
check_box.tool_tip: Darken the screen edges while in ADS in over-the-shoulder.

slider.label: Vignette strength:
slider.tool_tip: How dark the ADS screen-edge vignette is.
